original_draft.source_quote: White status LEDs light on DC plug-in; LPC serial port responds and all LPC commands work; pressing the power-on command ('1P') causes white LEDs to extinguish; compute module LCD and CPU serial produce no output. Likely cause: Power sequencing fails to sustain main compute rails after load-switch enable; possible overcurrent protection firing on +5 V, +3.3 V, or PCIE1_PWR at the point the compute module is turned on. Components mentioned: U20 (AP22815, PCIE1_PWR load switch)

evidence.reasoning: U20 PCIE1_PWR load switch directly named, maps to U20.
Failure of load switch to sustain output modeled as dead.
U20 is source_refdes for PCIE1_PWR per graph.

evidence.reasoning: PCIE1_PWR feeds compute module domain; with U20 dead the compute module is offline.

original_draft.source_quote: Probe VOUT from U2 with adapter plugged in - should ramp toward pack voltage; if 0 V, verify INTVCC (~5 V bootstrap) and PVIN rail integrity. PVIN at Q3 drain.
